title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final: IShowSpeed hypes BTS halftime show; backstage photo lights up X
summary_full: Popular streamer IShowSpeed enjoyed one of the biggest moments of the FIFA World Cup final after watching BTS perform during the halftime show. The viral streamer later met the K-pop group backstage. The internet personality became a trending topic as videos of his hilarious reaction spread across social media during the championship match between Spain and Argentina.
